# VisualShaderNodeTextureParameterTriplanar

**Inherits:** [VisualShaderNodeTextureParameter](class_visualshadernodetextureparameter.md#class-visualshadernodetextureparameter) **<** [VisualShaderNodeParameter](class_visualshadernodeparameter.md#class-visualshadernodeparameter) **<** [VisualShaderNode](class_visualshadernode.md#class-visualshadernode) **<** [Resource](class_resource.md#class-resource) **<** [RefCounted](class_refcounted.md#class-refcounted) **<** [Object](class_object.md#class-object)

Performs a uniform texture lookup with triplanar within the visual shader graph.

## Description

Performs a lookup operation on the texture provided as a uniform for the shader, with support for triplanar mapping.
